title: Green Chilli & Walnut Pesto Pasta
summary: Bright green homemade pesto is the secret ingredient in this simple pasta recipe.

ingredients.label: 200g Cacere, or any other small pasta
ingredients.name: Pasta

ingredients.label: 30g parmesan cheese, plus extra to serve
ingredients.name: Parmesan

method.description: Bring a large pan of salted water to the boil. Meanwhile, blitz the ingredients for the pesto into a smooth paste.
Drop the pasta into the boiling water and cook according to package instructions.

Heat a little olive oil to a large frying pan over a medium high heat. Add the kale and stir until starting to wilt, spoon in the pesto, then whisk in a ladle of the pasta water. Use a slotted spoon to move the pasta from the water to the large frying pan.
Toss the pasta well, taste and season with salt and pepper and extra lemon juice if needed. Spoon into bowls, grate with a little extra parmesan and finish with some extra black pepper.

chefs.name: Elena Silcock
chefs.summary: Elena Silcock is the Managing food editor at Mob. She's also a food writer, chef and food stylist who has worked for various brands including BBC Good Food and Olive Magazine as well as in the kitchens of restaurants in both London and Copenhagen.
